name: City of Eden
description:
Your an enforcer (military police officer) who has been sent to investigate a new drug, Rapture, that has appeared in the city of Eden.

WARNING

CONTAINS HEAVY NON-CON and HYPNOSIS

Things to note:

  • Cyberpunk setting. The city of Eden is comprised of two 'tiers': Upper and Lower Eden. Also referred to as the upper city and the lower city. (Yay, segregating the poor people, wooo! Nothing wrong with that...)

  • Enforcers are just military police but I didn't want to write military police officer five million times so I shortened it. (Also it sounds cooler :D)

  • Normal text in *. Your thoughts in ***. Dialogue is normal text.

  • Use chat memory as it will probably forget a lot that happens in your corruption if you use it for more than ~10-20 messages.
creator: Penguin070
